questions: > Trivial UI edit path — audit / design / review skipped.
> 1. Continue — perform the single-file edit, then write a `trivial_edit` envelope back into state.ticket (files, lines_changed, new_component, new_state, new_dependency)
> Trivial edit applied; run the smoke test layer covering the touched file.
> 1. Continue — invoke `/tests-execute` with smoke scope, then write the verdict back to `state.tests`
> 2. Skip — record `state.tests = {"verdict": "success", "scope": "none"}` (logged as a deferred verification)
